creator: sch@efers.org
text:
Every time on application start, kdenlive runs the configuration wizard, stating "your kdenlive version was upgraded to 0.9.10. please take some time to review the basic settings."

FreeBSD 11.1 release, pkg repo: latest.

I found a similar post from a FreeBSD user on the kde forums from last year, but it never was replied to.

https://forum.kde.org/viewtopic.php?f=265&t=131454
